All eyes on the horizon.

At Wisk, we are pioneers, innovators, thinkers, and doers. We come from all kinds of backgrounds – engineering, design, manufacturing, aviation, and more.
.
All of us are aligned in our vision to create a greater future for air travel.

Our First Flight was a success.
Now we are ready to soar!

Our first flight was a success. Now we are ready to soar!

By automating most elements of flight, we can eliminate many of the risks that come from human error.

Sébastien Vigneron

Wisk CEO

We design and build safety into everything we do.

How we design

Meet or exceed commercial aviation safety standards

Circular, iterative process

Many triple-redundant systems

No single point of failure

How we test

Comprehensive testing on every component

High-fidelity simulations including adverse conditions and contingency scenarios

Surrogate aircraft as flying test beds

Certification we’re working toward

Type certification

Production certification

Operation certification

See our process

The journey from our Gen 1 to Gen 6 aircraft.

Since 2010, Wisk has successfully flown five generations of aircraft and conducted over 1,750 safe test flights. Come fly down memory lane with us.

Since 2010, Wisk has successfully flown five generations of aircraft and conducted over 1,750 safe test flights. Discover how far we’ve come, and where we’re going.

Join the team.
Transform the future.

Our vision to elevate the future of aviation is no small feat. But we have the technology, the determination, and most importantly, the dedicated people to do it. It’s a pretty good reason to come to work. Join us and you’ll see.
